summary: The disconnect reason decoder divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in RLP error returns; no disconnect reason decoding behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 143: M	crates/net/eth-wire-types/src/disconnect_reason.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to InputTooShort, Overflow, UnexpectedString, and ListLengthMismatch error returns.
No empty-buffer check, overflow check, RLP header decoding, list validation, payload length check, or reason decoding behavior changed.
